english.headline: The Day You Learn
english.commentator: It wasn't the result Hammond Park wanted — Mundijong got them 56 to 40 for the first loss of the season — but don't let the scoreboard fool you about number 13's day. Alek was itching to get on from the bench, and when he did he never stopped: a clean mark, a brilliant touch on the ball as it went through the posts to save a certain goal, and then a midfield masterclass with seven tackles in the third quarter alone. Ten tackles from eighteen for the match and eight disposals from ten — against bigger bodies, he stood tall. He even copped a hard knock and an injury late, but he gave everything right to the final siren. As the coach said, they didn't lose today — they were handed a lesson. And number 13 will be back better for it. Frankland Park, remember this kid's name!
